title: Add production-ready user authentication
description: Implement secure user authentication by consolidating auth systems. AuthService (PBKDF2) is the primary system using Payload collections. UserStore (SHA-256) needs evaluation for removal or fallback use. UserRole ('admin'|'user'|'guest'|'student'|'instructor') must be aligned with RbacRole ('admin'|'editor'|'viewer'). The goal is to eliminate dual-auth confusion and ensure production-ready security with consistent role-based access control.
existing_patterns: AuthService with PBKDF2 password verification at src/auth/auth-service.ts:45-60
Payload Users collection with role field at src/collections/Users.ts:76-86
questions: Should UserStore be removed entirely or kept as a fallback for non-Payload operations?
Are there any features still depending on UserStore that would break if removed?
Should UserRole ('admin'|'user'|'guest'|'student'|'instructor') be aligned to RbacRole ('admin'|'editor'|'viewer') or vice versa?
